ead.archdesc:

converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Expanded Food and Nutrition Education Program records
Cornell Cooperative Extension. Expanded Food and Nutrition Education Program
21-24-3292
18.5 cubic feet. 18.5 cubic feet.
1969-2019. Correspondence, Photographs, Subject Files, Reports, Videotapes, Slides. Includes reports, correspondence, in-service projects, subject files, photographs, videotapes, slides, and curriculum material pertaining to this federal nutrition program (EFNEP). Sponsored by Cornell Cooperative Extension, including records on WIC. Collection material in English 5146408
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
N/A
Date completed:
September 2004
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff April 2008
Date modified:
RMC Staff, August 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes reports, correspondence, in-service projects, subject files, photographs, videotapes, slides, nutrition educators training material and curriculum material pertaining to this federal nutrition program (EFNEP. Sponsored by Cornell Cooperative Extension including records on WIC.
RELATED MATERIAL
See also collections #21-24-1975, Cornell University Cooperative Extension Records; #29-4-2733 Division of Nutritional Sciences Cooperative Extension Nutrition Program Records; and #29-1-3247, Division of Nutritional Sciences Records for related material.
SERIES LIST
Series I. County (Data) Year End Reports Boxes: 1-4
Series II. Updates and Inservices Box: 5
Series III. Correspondence Box: 6
Series IV. Narrative Reports, Progress Reports-Issues by Topic Boxes: 7-9
Series V. Conferences and Workshops Boxes: 8, 9
Series VI. Publications and Resources Boxes: 8-13
Series VII. Slides, Photographs, and Videos Boxes: 7, 9, 10
Cite As:
Expanded Food and Nutrition Education Program, records #21-24-3292. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Slides (photographs). Videotapes. Photographs. Curriculum planning. Nutritional Sciences -- Study and teaching. Children -- Nutrition. Nutrition policy. Nutrition extension work -- New York (State) Special Supplemental Food Program for Women, Infants, and Children (U.S.)

Scope and Contents
Includes cassette tapes from New York City in English and Spanish on the topics of snacks, morning and afternoon 24 hour recall, milk, fruits and vegetables, feeding your young, food in the morning and shopping tipsNew York State EFNEP Food Stamp Pilot Programtr-18470; 19021-190481980-0421
Scope and Contents
Tapes in English and Spanish produced in New York City, Steuben, Erie and Wayne counties and include the following topics: snacks, morning and afternoon 24 hour recall, milk, fruits and vegetables, feeding young kids, food in the morning and shopping tips.County Mini-lessons for New York State EFNEP1980-19891117"Try Something New"- Martha Mapes and Gail Keown19801118"Early Childhood Educator's Nutrition Handbook"19801119Food for the Family-Lesson Plans19801420Aides' Guide to the Progression Model and Supervising Agent's Guide to the Progression Model19801421Teaching and Applying Educational Principles in EFNEP19801421A"The Food Factory"- nutrition series for youth19811120New York State EFNEP/Food Stamp Pilot Project- Communicating Nutrition1981-031121Fun Times With Food - Resource1981103Bibliography-EFNEP-USDA1981-071422Effect of Environmental Changes on Food Consumption and Nutrient Intake Among Puerto Rican Families19811423Resources for Adult Leaders in Group Programs for School-Aged Children1981-19851122EFNEP Initial Aide Training- by Linda Proctor19821123EFNEP Initial Aide Training- by Linda Proctor19821124"The Aide and the Homemaker"- How to Achieve an Effective Aide Homemaker Relationship in EFNEPFitchen, Janet M.198219841125"The Aide and the Homemaker" How to Achieve an Effective Aide Homemaker Relationship in EFNEP Instructor's manualFitchen, Janet M.1985-111125It's Your Move1982105EFNEP calendar19821732EFNEP agent notebook1983-19931126A Guide to Evaluation in the EFNEP ProgramFebruary 19831424Breastfeeding Education Program19831127"New Opportunities for Youth- Working together with 4-H and EFNEP"19831128EFNEP audio cassette programsApril 19831129EFNEP brochure19831013New York State EFNEP/Food Stamp Pilot ProgramAugust 19831425Expanded Food and Nutrition Education Program PoliciesUnited States. Scope and Contents
Includes cassette tapes from New York City in English and Spanish on the topics of snacks, morning and afternoon 24 hour recall, milk, fruits and vegetables, feeding your young, food in the morning and shopping tipsNew York State EFNEP Food Stamp Pilot Programtr-18470; 19021-190481980-0421
Scope and Contents
Tapes in English and Spanish produced in New York City, Steuben, Erie and Wayne counties and include the following topics: snacks, morning and afternoon 24 hour recall, milk, fruits and vegetables, feeding young kids, food in the morning and shopping tips.County Mini-lessons for New York State EFNEP1980-19891117"Try Something New"- Martha Mapes and Gail Keown19801118"Early Childhood Educator's Nutrition Handbook"19801119Food for the Family-Lesson Plans19801420Aides' Guide to the Progression Model and Supervising Agent's Guide to the Progression Model19801421Teaching and Applying Educational Principles in EFNEP19801421A"The Food Factory"- nutrition series for youth19811120New York State EFNEP/Food Stamp Pilot Project- Communicating Nutrition1981-031121Fun Times With Food - Resource1981103Bibliography-EFNEP-USDA1981-071422Effect of Environmental Changes on Food Consumption and Nutrient Intake Among Puerto Rican Families19811423Resources for Adult Leaders in Group Programs for School-Aged Children1981-19851122EFNEP Initial Aide Training- by Linda Proctor19821123EFNEP Initial Aide Training- by Linda Proctor19821124"The Aide and the Homemaker"- How to Achieve an Effective Aide Homemaker Relationship in EFNEPFitchen, Janet M.198219841125"The Aide and the Homemaker" How to Achieve an Effective Aide Homemaker Relationship in EFNEP Instructor's manualFitchen, Janet M.1985-111125It's Your Move1982105EFNEP calendar19821732EFNEP agent notebook1983-19931126A Guide to Evaluation in the EFNEP ProgramFebruary 19831424Breastfeeding Education Program19831127"New Opportunities for Youth- Working together with 4-H and EFNEP"19831128EFNEP audio cassette programsApril 19831129EFNEP brochure19831013New York State EFNEP/Food Stamp Pilot ProgramAugust 19831425Expanded Food and Nutrition Education Program PoliciesUnited States.
